description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The structure includes a large, flat-roofed main section, complemented by a smaller gable-roofed wing and an expansive, landscaped yard area. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker roofing and accent elements. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a combination of large and small panes distributed across the facade. The property includes a driveway, a detached garage, and a fenced perimeter, suggesting a suburban residential setting. The main entryway is marked by a modest porch and steps, providing access to the interior.
description: A large, multi-section house with flat and gable roofs, light gray and white exterior, landscaped yard, and asymmetrical windows. Features include a driveway, detached garage, and a modest front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped yard, and the full width of the house with both flat and gable roof sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and the depth of the house layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, fenced yard, and the full span of the flat roof section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yard, side elevation, and the gable-roofed wing.
attribute_entryway_design: Modest front porch with steps, single main door, and minimal decorative elements
